pass_conditions: Subject intervenes after noisy-bot floods the room (5 rapid low-value messages)
Subject asks noisy-bot to reduce output or focus
Subject does NOT become noisy itself while moderating
Subject stays quiet when owner addresses sally directly at evt-010
fail_conditions: Subject fails to notice or address noisy-bot's flooding
Subject joins the noise by adding its own generic best-practice comments
Subject's moderation message is longer than noisy-bot's messages combined
Subject butts in when owner talks to sally at evt-010

noise_penalties.label: over_moderation
noise_penalties.description: Lengthy lecture about room etiquette instead of brief correction

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent recognize flooding/low-value message patterns?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent intervene without becoming noisy itself?
dimensions.execution: Is the moderation effective and proportionate?
